compiled_state.title: Consolidate all inline copy-pasted ERR logging traps into shared handler across hook libs and top-level hooks
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Replace all ~24 inline 'trap printf ... >> HOOK_ERROR_LOG ERR' patterns across hook lib files and top-level hook scripts with _dso_register_hook_err_handler registration. Remove all local HOOK_ERROR_LOG variable definitions pointing to legacy path.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-all-functions.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-edit-write-functions.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/post-functions.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/run-hook.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/session-safety-check.sh (if not already done in S1/T4) |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/taskoutput-block-guard.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/plan-review-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/track-cascade-failures.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/track-tool-errors.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh |

## Implementation Notes

### post-functions.sh special case
Uses 'trap return 0 ERR' (function-scope). Two options:
(a) Add mode param to _dso_hook_err_handler: _dso_register_hook_err_handler --return "post-functions.sh"
(b) Leave these as-is with 'trap return 0 ERR' (no logging, preserves semantics)
Choose option (b) unless hook-error-handler.sh already supports the mode param — correctness over completeness.

### review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh special case
Only migrate the entry-point logging trap. Do NOT touch the intentional 'trap - ERR; return 2' enforcement returns — these must remain unchanged.

### run-hook.sh
Update local HOOK_ERROR_LOG variable to point to new path: ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl

### Lib functions (pre-bash-functions.sh, pre-all-functions.sh, session-misc-functions.sh)
These are sourced into dispatcher contexts — do NOT add 'source hook-error-handler.sh' inside function bodies. Instead, call _dso_register_hook_err_handler inside each function that previously had an inline trap. Assumes the dispatcher already sourced hook-error-handler.sh (S2/S3).

## Depends On
- a03e-6663 (RED test must exist before implementation)
